+        let cleanupModelName = settingsStore.cleanupEnabled ? settingsStore.selectedCleanupModelKind : "Cleanup disabled"

+            speechModelID: settingsStore.speechModelID,
+            cleanupModelName: cleanupModelName,
+            cleanupUsedFallback: false
+        )
+

+            try recordingArchiver.archive(request)
+        } catch {
+            print("Failed to archive recording: \(error.localizedDescription)")
+        }
+    }

@@ -0,0 +1,256 @@
+import Foundation
+
+struct RecordingArchiveRequest: Equatable, Sendable {
+    let id: UUID
+    let createdAt: Date
+    let audioSamples: [Float]
+    let windowContents: String?
+    let rawTranscription: String?
+    let correctedTranscription: String?
+    let speechModelID: String
+    let cleanupModelName: String
+    let cleanupUsedFallback: Bool
+    let speakerFilteringEnabled: Bool
+    let speakerFilteringRan: Bool
+    let speakerFilteringUsedFallback: Bool
+    let transcriptionDuration: TimeInterval?
+    let cleanupDuration: TimeInterval?
+
+    init(
+        id: UUID = UUID(),
+        createdAt: Date = Date(),
+        audioSamples: [Float],
+        windowContents: String? = nil,
+        rawTranscription: String? = nil,
+        correctedTranscription: String? = nil,
+        speechModelID: String,
+        cleanupModelName: String,
+        cleanupUsedFallback: Bool,
+        speakerFilteringEnabled: Bool = false,
+        speakerFilteringRan: Bool = false,
+        speakerFilteringUsedFallback: Bool = false,
+        transcriptionDuration: TimeInterval? = nil,
+        cleanupDuration: TimeInterval? = nil
+    ) {
+        self.id = id
+        self.createdAt = createdAt
+        self.audioSamples = audioSamples
+        self.windowContents = windowContents
+        self.rawTranscription = rawTranscription
+        self.correctedTranscription = correctedTranscription
+        self.speechModelID = speechModelID
+        self.cleanupModelName = cleanupModelName
+        self.cleanupUsedFallback = cleanupUsedFallback
+        self.speakerFilteringEnabled = speakerFilteringEnabled
+        self.speakerFilteringRan = speakerFilteringRan
+        self.speakerFilteringUsedFallback = speakerFilteringUsedFallback
+        self.transcriptionDuration = transcriptionDuration
+        self.cleanupDuration = cleanupDuration
+    }
+}
+
+protocol RecordingArchiving: AnyObject {
+    func archive(_ request: RecordingArchiveRequest) throws
+}
+
+final class NoOpRecordingArchiver: RecordingArchiving {
+    func archive(_ request: RecordingArchiveRequest) throws {
+        _ = request
+    }
+}
+
+struct TranscriptionLabEntry: Codable, Equatable, Sendable {
+    let id: UUID
+    let createdAt: Date
+    let audioFileName: String
+    let audioDuration: TimeInterval
+    let windowContents: String?
+    let rawTranscription: String?
+    let correctedTranscription: String?
+    let speechModelID: String
+    let cleanupModelName: String
+    let cleanupUsedFallback: Bool
+    let speakerFilteringEnabled: Bool
+    let speakerFilteringRan: Bool
+    let speakerFilteringUsedFallback: Bool
+    let diarizationSummary: String?
+}
+
+struct TranscriptionLabStageTiming: Codable, Equatable, Sendable {
+    let transcriptionDuration: TimeInterval?
+    let cleanupDuration: TimeInterval?
+}
+
+final class TranscriptionLabArchiveStore: RecordingArchiving {
+    private let rootURL: URL
+    private let fileManager: FileManager
+    private let capacity: Int
+    private let encoder = JSONEncoder()
+    private let decoder = JSONDecoder()
+
+    init(
+        rootURL: URL = AppSupportPaths.transcriptionLabRootURL(),
+        fileManager: FileManager = .default,
+        capacity: Int = 50
+    ) {
+        self.rootURL = rootURL
+        self.fileManager = fileManager
+        self.capacity = capacity
+        encoder.outputFormatting = [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys]
+    }
+
+    func archive(_ request: RecordingArchiveRequest) throws {
+        guard !request.audioSamples.isEmpty else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        let audioRootURL = rootURL.appending(path: "audio", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+        try fileManager.createDirectory(at: audioRootURL, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
+
+        let audioFileName = "\(request.id.uuidString).wav"
+        let audioURL = audioRootURL.appending(path: audioFileName, directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+        let audioData = WAVAudioEncoder.encode(samples: request.audioSamples)
+        try audioData.write(to: audioURL, options: .atomic)
+
+        var entries = loadEntries()
+        var timings = loadTimings()
+
+        entries.removeAll { $0.id == request.id }
+        entries.append(
+            TranscriptionLabEntry(
+                id: request.id,
+                createdAt: request.createdAt,
+                audioFileName: audioFileName,
+                audioDuration: Double(request.audioSamples.count) / 16_000.0,
+                windowContents: request.windowContents,
+                rawTranscription: request.rawTranscription,
+                correctedTranscription: request.correctedTranscription,
+                speechModelID: request.speechModelID,
+                cleanupModelName: request.cleanupModelName,
+                cleanupUsedFallback: request.cleanupUsedFallback,
+                speakerFilteringEnabled: request.speakerFilteringEnabled,
+                speakerFilteringRan: request.speakerFilteringRan,
+                speakerFilteringUsedFallback: request.speakerFilteringUsedFallback,
+                diarizationSummary: nil
+            )
+        )
+        entries.sort { $0.createdAt > $1.createdAt }
+        timings[request.id.uuidString] = TranscriptionLabStageTiming(
+            transcriptionDuration: request.transcriptionDuration,
+            cleanupDuration: request.cleanupDuration
+        )
+
+        if entries.count > capacity {
+            let prunedEntries = entries.suffix(from: capacity)
+            for entry in prunedEntries {
+                timings.removeValue(forKey: entry.id.uuidString)
+                let prunedAudioURL = audioRootURL.appending(path: entry.audioFileName, directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+                try? fileManager.removeItem(at: prunedAudioURL)
+            }
+            entries = Array(entries.prefix(capacity))
+        }
+
+        try write(entries, to: rootURL.appending(path: "transcription-lab-index.json", directoryHint: .notDirectory))
+        try write(timings, to: rootURL.appending(path: "transcription-lab-timings.json", directoryHint: .notDirectory))
+    }
+
+    func loadEntries() -> [TranscriptionLabEntry] {
+        let indexURL = rootURL.appending(path: "transcription-lab-index.json", directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+        guard fileManager.fileExists(atPath: indexURL.path()) else {
+            return []
+        }
+
+        do {
+            let data = try Data(contentsOf: indexURL)
+            let entries = try decoder.decode([TranscriptionLabEntry].self, from: data)
+            return entries.sorted { $0.createdAt > $1.createdAt }
+        } catch {
+            resetArchive()
+            return []
+        }
+    }
+
+    func loadTimings() -> [String: TranscriptionLabStageTiming] {
+        let timingsURL = rootURL.appending(path: "transcription-lab-timings.json", directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+        guard fileManager.fileExists(atPath: timingsURL.path()) else {
+            return [:]
+        }
+
+        do {
+            let data = try Data(contentsOf: timingsURL)
+            return try decoder.decode([String: TranscriptionLabStageTiming].self, from: data)
+        } catch {
+            resetArchive()
+            return [:]
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func write<T: Encodable>(_ value: T, to url: URL) throws {
+        try fileManager.createDirectory(at: rootURL, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
+        let data = try encoder.encode(value)
+        try data.write(to: url, options: .atomic)
+    }
+
+    private func resetArchive() {
+        try? fileManager.removeItem(at: rootURL.appending(path: "transcription-lab-index.json", directoryHint: .notDirectory))
+        try? fileManager.removeItem(at: rootURL.appending(path: "transcription-lab-timings.json", directoryHint: .notDirectory))
+        try? fileManager.removeItem(at: rootURL.appending(path: "audio", directoryHint: .isDirectory))
+    }
+}
+
+private enum WAVAudioEncoder {
+    static func encode(samples: [Float]) -> Data {
+        let dataChunkSize = samples.count * MemoryLayout<Int16>.size
+        var data = Data()
+        data.reserveCapacity(44 + dataChunkSize)
+
+        data.appendASCII("RIFF")
+        data.appendUInt32LE(UInt32(36 + dataChunkSize))
+        data.appendASCII("WAVE")
+        data.appendASCII("fmt ")
+        data.appendUInt32LE(16)
+        data.appendUInt16LE(1)
+        data.appendUInt16LE(1)
+        data.appendUInt32LE(16_000)
+        data.appendUInt32LE(32_000)
+        data.appendUInt16LE(2)
+        data.appendUInt16LE(16)
+        data.appendASCII("data")
+        data.appendUInt32LE(UInt32(dataChunkSize))
+
+        for sample in samples {
+            let clamped = max(-1.0, min(1.0, Double(sample)))
+            let intSample = Int16((clamped * 32_767.0).rounded())
+            data.appendInt16LE(intSample)
+        }
+
+        return data
+    }
+}
+
+private extension Data {
+    mutating func appendASCII(_ string: String) {
+        append(string.data(using: .ascii)!)
+    }
+
+    mutating func appendUInt16LE(_ value: UInt16) {
+        var littleEndian = value.littleEndian
+        Swift.withUnsafeBytes(of: &littleEndian) { bytes in
+            append(contentsOf: bytes)
+        }
+    }
+
+    mutating func appendUInt32LE(_ value: UInt32) {
+        var littleEndian = value.littleEndian
+        Swift.withUnsafeBytes(of: &littleEndian) { bytes in
+            append(contentsOf: bytes)
+        }
+    }
+
+    mutating func appendInt16LE(_ value: Int16) {
+        var littleEndian = value.littleEndian
+        Swift.withUnsafeBytes(of: &littleEndian) { bytes in
+            append(contentsOf: bytes)
+        }
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,68 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class DictationSessionTraceTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testTraceLogsSummaryWhenPasteEnds() {
+        let logger = RecordingPerformanceTraceLogger()
+        let builder = LiveDictationSessionTraceBuilder(
+            dateProvider: SequencedDateProvider(dates: [
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0.0),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0.2),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0.4),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1.4),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1.5),
+                Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1.65),
+            ]),
+            logger: logger
+        )
+
+        let trace = builder.makeTrace()
+        trace.markMicrophoneLive()
+        trace.markHotkeyLifted()
+        trace.markMicrophoneCold()
+        trace.markTranscriptionStart()
+        trace.markPasteStart()
+        trace.markPasteEnd()
+
+        let message = try! XCTUnwrap(logger.messages.first)
+        XCTAssertTrue(message.contains("hotkey_lift_to_mic_cold=200ms"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(message.contains("transcription=100ms"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(message.contains("paste=150ms"))
+        XCTAssertTrue(message.contains("total=1650ms"))
+    }
+
+    func testAbandonedTraceDoesNotLog() {
+        let logger = RecordingPerformanceTraceLogger()
+        let builder = LiveDictationSessionTraceBuilder(
+            dateProvider: SequencedDateProvider(dates: [Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0.0)]),
+            logger: logger
+        )
+
+        let trace = builder.makeTrace()
+        trace.markMicrophoneLive()
+        trace.abandon()
+        trace.markPasteEnd()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(logger.messages, [])
+    }
+}
+
+private final class SequencedDateProvider: DateProviding {
+    private var dates: [Date]
+
+    init(dates: [Date]) {
+        self.dates = dates
+    }
+
+    func currentDate() -> Date {
+        dates.removeFirst()
+    }
+}
+
+private final class RecordingPerformanceTraceLogger: PerformanceTraceLogging {
+    private(set) var messages: [String] = []
+
+    func logPerformance(_ message: String) {
+        messages.append(message)
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,56 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class PostPasteLearningCoordinatorTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testRecordPasteDetectsCorrectionWhenFocusedTextDiffers() {
+        let coordinator = SimplePostPasteLearningCoordinator()
+        let snapshot = PasteSessionSnapshot(
+            pastedText: "teh cat",
+            timestamp: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1_234),
+            applicationBundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor",
+            windowID: 77,
+            windowFrame: nil,
+            focusedElementFrame: nil,
+            focusedElementText: "the cat"
+        )
+
+        coordinator.recordPaste(snapshot)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            coordinator.observations,
+            [
+                PostPasteLearningObservation(
+                    pastedText: "teh cat",
+                    focusedElementText: "the cat",
+                    correctionDetected: true
+                )
+            ]
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testRecordPasteIgnoresEmptyFocusedText() {
+        let coordinator = SimplePostPasteLearningCoordinator()
+        let snapshot = PasteSessionSnapshot(
+            pastedText: "transcribed text",
+            timestamp: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1_234),
+            applicationBundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor",
+            windowID: 77,
+            windowFrame: nil,
+            focusedElementFrame: nil,
+            focusedElementText: "   "
+        )
+
+        coordinator.recordPaste(snapshot)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            coordinator.observations,
+            [
+                PostPasteLearningObservation(
+                    pastedText: "transcribed text",
+                    focusedElementText: "   ",
+                    correctionDetected: false
+                )
+            ]
+        )
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,105 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class TranscriptionLabArchiveStoreTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testArchiveWritesIndexTimingsAndWAVAudio() throws {
+        let rootURL = makeTemporaryRootURL()
+        let store = TranscriptionLabArchiveStore(rootURL: rootURL)
+        let request = RecordingArchiveRequest(
+            id: UUID(uuidString: "AAAAAAAA-BBBB-CCCC-DDDD-EEEEEEEEEEEE")!,
+            createdAt: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1_234),
+            audioSamples: [0.5, -0.25, 0.0],
+            rawTranscription: "raw text",
+            correctedTranscription: "clean text",
+            speechModelID: "openai_whisper-small.en",
+            cleanupModelName: "Cleanup disabled",
+            cleanupUsedFallback: false,
+            transcriptionDuration: 1.2,
+            cleanupDuration: 0.3
+        )
+
+        try store.archive(request)
+
+        let entry = try XCTUnwrap(store.loadEntries().first)
+        XCTAssertEqual(entry.id, request.id)
+        XCTAssertEqual(entry.audioFileName, "\(request.id.uuidString).wav")
+        XCTAssertEqual(entry.audioDuration, Double(request.audioSamples.count) / 16_000.0, accuracy: 0.000_001)
+        XCTAssertEqual(entry.rawTranscription, "raw text")
+        XCTAssertEqual(entry.correctedTranscription, "clean text")
+        XCTAssertEqual(entry.speechModelID, "openai_whisper-small.en")
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            store.loadTimings()[request.id.uuidString],
+            TranscriptionLabStageTiming(transcriptionDuration: 1.2, cleanupDuration: 0.3)
+        )
+
+        let audioURL = rootURL
+            .appending(path: "audio", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: entry.audioFileName, directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+        let audioData = try Data(contentsOf: audioURL)
+        XCTAssertEqual(String(decoding: audioData.prefix(4), as: UTF8.self), "RIFF")
+        XCTAssertEqual(String(decoding: audioData.subdata(in: 8..<12), as: UTF8.self), "WAVE")
+    }
+
+    func testArchivePrunesOldestEntriesBeyondCapacity() throws {
+        let rootURL = makeTemporaryRootURL()
+        let store = TranscriptionLabArchiveStore(rootURL: rootURL, capacity: 1)
+        let firstRequest = RecordingArchiveRequest(
+            id: UUID(uuidString: "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111")!,
+            createdAt: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 100),
+            audioSamples: [0.1],
+            rawTranscription: "first",
+            correctedTranscription: "first",
+            speechModelID: "model-a",
+            cleanupModelName: "Cleanup disabled",
+            cleanupUsedFallback: false
+        )
+        let secondRequest = RecordingArchiveRequest(
+            id: UUID(uuidString: "22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222")!,
+            createdAt: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 200),
+            audioSamples: [0.2],
+            rawTranscription: "second",
+            correctedTranscription: "second",
+            speechModelID: "model-b",
+            cleanupModelName: "Cleanup disabled",
+            cleanupUsedFallback: false
+        )
+
+        try store.archive(firstRequest)
+        try store.archive(secondRequest)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.loadEntries().map(\.id), [secondRequest.id])
+        XCTAssertNil(store.loadTimings()[firstRequest.id.uuidString])
+
+        let firstAudioURL = rootURL
+            .appending(path: "audio", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: "\(firstRequest.id.uuidString).wav", directoryHint: .notDirectory)
+        XCTAssertFalse(FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: firstAudioURL.path()))
+    }
+
+    func testArchiveSkipsEmptyAudioBuffers() throws {
+        let rootURL = makeTemporaryRootURL()
+        let store = TranscriptionLabArchiveStore(rootURL: rootURL)
+        let request = RecordingArchiveRequest(
+            audioSamples: [],
+            speechModelID: "model-a",
+            cleanupModelName: "Cleanup disabled",
+            cleanupUsedFallback: false
+        )
+
+        try store.archive(request)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.loadEntries(), [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.loadTimings(), [:])
+        XCTAssertFalse(FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: rootURL.path()))
+    }
+
+    private func makeTemporaryRootURL() -> URL {
+        let rootURL = FileManager.default.temporaryDirectory
+            .appending(path: UUID().uuidString, directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+        addTeardownBlock {
+            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: rootURL)
+        }
+        return rootURL
+    }
+}
